source_pr.title: executor: make IndexReaders in the inner side of IndexJoins support direct reading
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #24255 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: executor: make IndexReaders in the inner side of IndexJoins support direct reading

### What is changed and how it works?

Please see more details at https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/24255.
In this PR, we:
1. use `IndexReader` directly instead of using `PartitionExecForIndexReader` to read partition table;
2. remove `PartitionExecForIndexReader`;
3. add a test case;

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- executor: make IndexReaders in the inner side of IndexJoins support direct reading
